test_cases.description: Verifies the skill writes cold email that sounds like a peer, not a sales template
test_cases.input: Write a cold email to a VP of Engineering at a 100-person SaaS company about our code review automation tool
expected_output_excludes: I hope this email finds you well

test_cases.description: Verifies the skill uses interest-based CTAs rather than meeting requests in first touch
test_cases.input: Write a first-touch cold email asking to connect with a CTO about our infrastructure monitoring product

test_cases.description: Verifies the skill writes short, internal-looking subject lines without sales pitches
test_cases.input: Give me 3 subject line options for a cold email about a product analytics tool to startup founders
